overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from a covered sidewalk through a red-lit underpass to an open plaza with palm trees. The footage showcases neon-lit environments characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077, with detailed character models sitting on benches in a futuristic urban setting.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a rainy night under a massive urban overpass. The camera moves forward past a blue advertising kiosk and abandoned furniture, with wet concrete reflecting the ambient city lights. The environment is quiet and empty, with the path leading toward a distant red glow.

agents.ego_description: walking through a graffiti-covered underpass illuminated by red neon strips

trash and abandoned items littering the ground

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, enclosed underpass bathed in intense red neon light. Graffiti covers the walls, and debris is scattered across the concrete floor. The atmosphere shifts dramatically from the cool exterior to this warm, ominous red-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered city street with cyan neon storefronts

segments.scene_description: Exiting the red underpass, the lighting shifts to a cool cyan tone. The camera walks along a covered city street with neon storefronts on the right and metal railings on the left. Sparse pedestrians are visible ahead, walking in the same direction toward an open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees and modern architecture

camera tilts upward to look at the illuminated skyscraper facade

agents.ego_description: entering a plaza area and looking up at a towering glass building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a spacious urban plaza with palm trees and yellow benches. The camera walks forward then tilts up to reveal a massive glass skyscraper towering above, its windows glowing with blue light against the rainy night sky. People are seated on benches, engaged with their devices.

agents.ego_description: observing various characters sitting on benches, including one with prominent cybernetic leg implants and another with red hair

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the detailed characters seated on the yellow benches. A woman with red hair and blue pants sits next to a man with elaborate cybernetic leg implants. The camera pans across the seating area, showing the graffiti-covered walls and other individuals engaged in various activities, highlighting the cyberpunk aesthetic of the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk city, moving from a desolate urban overpass through a claustrophobic red corridor into a sprawling, neon-lit plaza. It begins under a massive overpass, gliding past a blue advertising kiosk and abandoned furniture across wet concrete that reflects the ambient city lights. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts dramatically into a narrow underpass bathed in intense red neon light and covered in graffiti, before emerging back into the cool cyan tones of a covered street lined with glowing storefronts. The scene then opens into a spacious plaza featuring palm trees and yellow benches, where the camera tilts upward to reveal a towering glass skyscraper glowing blue against the rainy night sky. Finally, the movement slows to focus on the detailed characters seated on the benches, panning across a woman with red hair and a man with cybernetic leg implants to highlight the gritty, high-tech aesthetic of the surroundings.
